title: Section 25
content: (1) The accounts of the University shall, once at least in every year and at intervals of not more than fifteen months, be audited by any person or firm authorised by the Governing Board. (2) The accounts of the University shall be audited, as per existing norms as laid down by the SAARC. (3) The accounts, when audited shall be published, and a copy of the accounts together with the audited report shall be submitted to the Secretary-General of the SAARC.
